_doc: Audio mapping consumed by autoload/audio.gd. GROUNDWORK ONLY — no audio ships yet.
Every path is empty, so the game is silent but every hook is live. To add sound:
1. drop a file under res://assets/audio/  (e.g. music/forest.ogg, sfx/chop.ogg)
2. put its res:// path in the matching key below.
It then plays automatically. SFX retrigger on the wired events; music cross-fades on
biome change. Call Audio.play("<event>") from code to add a brand-new action sound,
or Audio.play_music("<tag>") to drive music from somewhere else (e.g. a zone).

music._doc: Music tag -> stream path. Tags = each biome's 'music' field (biomes.json); zone names can be added too and driven via Audio.play_music(zone).

sfx._doc: Action event id -> stream path. These ids are fired by audio.gd's event hooks; add your own and call Audio.play(id).

footsteps._doc: Surface family -> footstep one-shot. Fired once per stride by world_visual_controller; surface comes from TerrainStyle.surface_family under the player. 'grass' is the fallback for any unmapped surface.

ambient._doc: Looping ambience bed -> stream path, cross-faded by Audio.set_ambient(channel,tag,target). 'rain'/'wind' auto-track the live Weather; the biome tags (same ids as 'music') play under the active biome. All loop seamlessly; volume eases with intensity.
